title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BAYAN-BAYANAN, MUNICIPALITY OF MARIKINA, PROVINCE OF RIZAL, TO CONCEPCION.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3733 / 52 OG No. 9, 4191 (August 16, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1514, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BAYAN-BAYANAN, MUNICIPALITY OF MARIKINA, PROVINCE OF RIZAL, TO CONCEPCION.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Bayan-Bayanan, Municipality of Marikina, Province of Rizal, is changed to Concepcion.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
